title: Xtra Fluffy American Vegetable Casserole
description: A floral, pillowy, weeknight American dish featuring sunflower oil and en-croute, flexitarian-friendly

ingredients.name: canned condensed cream of mushroom soup

instructions: Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with sunflower oil.
In a large bowl, combine the mixed vegetables, cream of mushroom soup, and milk, and stir until the soup is well combined.
Roll out one of the pie crusts and place it in the greased baking dish, trimming the edges to fit.
Fill the pie crust with the vegetable mixture and top with shredded cheddar cheese.
Roll out the second pie crust and use it to cover the top of the casserole, crimping the edges to seal.
Cut a few slits in the top crust to allow steam to escape.
Sprinkle the crushed French fried onions over the top of the casserole.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake for 40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the casserole is hot and bubbly.
